title: ARCHIVED - A Coordinated and Comprehensive Donation and Transplantation Strategy for Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - A Coordinated and Comprehensive Donation and Transplantation Strategy for Canada

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
The Report from the National Coordinating Committee for Organ and Tissue Donation and Transplantation was submitted to the Federal / Provincial / Territorial Advisory Committee on Health Services. The report describes recommendations for a coordinated and comprehensive organ and tissue donation, distribution and transplant system for Canada.
- Complete Report (PDF Version)
- People and Organization
- Legislation and Policies
- Technology and Information Systems
- Physical Infrastructure
- Appendix A: Principles for a Coordinated and Comprehensive Canadian Strategy for Organ and Tissue Donation and Transplantation
- Appendix B: The Canadian Council for Donation and Transplantation (CCDT)
- Appendix C: Secretariat of the Canadian Council for Donation and Tansplantation (CCDT)
- Appendix D: Advisory Committees to the Canadian Council for Donation and Transplantation
